title: bouteloua elata
intro: Bouteloua elata, also known as grama grass or blue grama, is a perennial bunchgrass native to the Great Plains of North America. It has been traditionally used by indigenous communities for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua elata include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
